title: Burmannia aprica
taxonomy: Burmannia aprica is classified within the family Burmanniaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the 'leafless orchids'. This family is a part of the order Asparagales. The genus Burmannia is native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. Burmannia aprica is a species within this genus, and more research is needed to fully understand its classification and relationships with other plants. Further studies on the plant's characteristics and evolutionary history are required to provide a more comprehensive classification.

preparations: Burmannia aprica is not a well-studied plant, but it is likely used in traditional herbal preparations in its native range.
